stimulus: Japanese biochemists Akira Endo and Masao Kuroda developed a technique for visualizing the structural dynamics of large proteins. Their ______blank cryo-EM (cryogenic electron microscopy), is now routinely used to capture three-dimensional snapshots of cellular machinery at near-atomic resolution.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The comma after "approach" pairs with the comma after the closing parenthesis to set off the supplementary element "named cryo-EM (cryogenic electron microscopy)" symmetrically with matched commas. The supplementary element identifies the approach's name and could be removed without affecting the grammar of the sentence.

Choice A is incorrect because a dash cannot pair with a closing comma to set off a supplementary element. Choice C is incorrect because an opening parenthesis cannot pair with a closing comma in this way. Choice D is incorrect because it fails to supply any opening punctuation for the supplementary element.
